possible_slide_title: Modern LLM Training: From Knowledge to Behavior

Modern LLM Training: From Knowledge to Behavior
Pre-Training
(Self-Supervised Learning)
Trained on large-scale datasets
Objective: predict tokens
Learns general knowledge
Requires massive compute and data
Fine-Tuning
(Alignment & Adaptation)
Smaller, curated datasets
Supervised + human feedback
Shapes behavior and style
Task-specific performance

BERT is an encoder-only transformer designed for language understanding.

BERT Input Representation
BERT takes two text segments as input and was originally trained to predict whether the second segment follows the first.
Later work suggested that next sentence prediction is not essential.

Causal Masking in GPT
At position 4, GPT can attend only to the current token and earlier tokens. This masking prevents access to future tokens.

GPT Uses the Transformer Decoder
GPT is a decoder-only transformer for autoregressive text generation.
Full transformer
19
Uses only the decoder stack
Keys and values come form the same sequence as queries.
Uses
causal self-attention
Generates one token at a time
Causal self-attention = each token cannot see future tokens.

LLMs are transformers trained to predict the next token given context
